g.text: From Trace to Atomic Supervision Unit
Unique identifier for the full reasoning trace.
Identifier for the specific task or problem instance.

Sequential number of the step within the trace

Correctness of the overall trace's final answer.
The minimal supervision unit in PRM is the step,
not the answer; schema defines supervision quality
